title: orobanche gracilis subsp. deludens
intro: Orobanche gracilis subsp. deludens is a species of parasitic plant in the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae), specifically a subspecies of the Orobanche gracilis plant that is known to be native to certain regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Orobanche gracilis subsp. deludens include its potential to lower blood pressure and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tincture or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
